parameters.content:
## 📑 Closing Document Validator

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for closing packages
2. Extracts data from closing disclosure, deed, note
3. Cross-validates names, addresses, amounts
4. Flags inconsistencies across documents
5. Logs validation results to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with discrepancy report

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for closing documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   File Number | Property | Buyer | Seller | Amount | Doc Type | Validation Status | Discrepancies | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Closing coordinators
- Transaction managers
- Title company processors

parameters.prompt: Extract real estate closing document data as flat fields only — no nested objects. Extract: documentType (closing disclosure/HUD-1/settlement statement/deed/mortgage note/etc), fileNumber, closingDate. Property: propertyStreet, propertyCity, propertyState, propertyZip, propertyCounty, parcelNumber. Parties: buyerName, buyerAddress, sellerName, sellerAddress. Loan: loanAmount, loanType (conventional/FHA/VA/USDA/cash), interestRate (decimal), loanTerm. Financials: purchasePrice, earnestMoneyDeposit, totalClosingCosts, cashToClose, sellerProceeds. Agents: lenderName, titleCompany, closingAgentName. Execution: buyerSigned (true/false), sellerSigned (true/false), notarized (true/false). All monetary values as plain numbers in dollars.
